title: Misato after 3I
wikitext:
[]: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by Apox » Tue Jun 14, 2016 9:44 am I'm curious what everyone's thoughts are on Misato after 3I. Why didn't she come back? What would her reaction be if she did after seeing the ruined world. Misato put a lot of (misplaced) faith in Shinji that he was going to save humanity from annihilation, so I think her finding out that he was in fact the "catalyst" for said destruction would be interesting.

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Jun 14, 2016 9:57 am Well it's down to interpretation but the chances are she did eventually come back. My assumption is that what we see on that beach is pretty much just after 3I and Asuka/Shinji are the first two to return. Yui tells us that others can return so I think it's likely that Misato will come back. I also think her reaction to Shinji would be positive, she'd be likely to give him and possibly Asuka a massive hug after all they have gone through. I think the state of the world would shock or disturb her, but they would power through. Whilst its true Shinji was the catalyst for the destruction it wasn't as if he had much choice and in the end he was the saviour of humanity. That destruction was going to happen regardless and if it wasn't for Rei at the last minute giving the keys to Shinji it would have ended completely in either SEELE or Gendo's favour.

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by mammaluser » Fri Jun 17, 2016 7:04 am You gotta remember that Shinji said that everyone should choose wheter to stay like LCL or become physical again, so probably that would take time.

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by Chainer3000 » Sat Jun 18, 2016 10:36 am Is it possible Misato never joined in the human instrumentally project? She, like Gendo, was killed prior to the actual Rei-soul-grabbing, and that seemed to have excluded Gendo from joining in on the LCL party. I always thought it remained a bit ambiguous as to whether or not she took part. If she did, I can't see Misato choosing not to come back after reflecting like Shinji did - she may be damaged, but she certainly at least seemed to already understand that you have to take the good with the bad in life and the importance of individuality. It helps that she's, yah know, got an adult's physiology, rather than the yarn-ball clusterfuck of mishmashed, confused, hair-trigger-balanced emotions known as the developing pre-teen's mind (AKA a good Eva-pilot, haha)

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by Moap » Sun Jul 03, 2016 7:15 am Chainer3000 wrote: Is it possible Misato never joined in the human instrumentally project? She, like Gendo, was killed prior to the actual Rei-soul-grabbing, and that seemed to have excluded Gendo from joining in on the LCL party. I always thought it remained a bit ambiguous as to whether or not she took part. If she did, I can't see Misato choosing not to come back after reflecting like Shinji did - she may be damaged, but she certainly at least seemed to already understand that you have to take the good with the bad in life and the importance of individuality. It helps that she's, yah know, got an adult's physiology, rather than the yarn-ball clusterfuck of mishmashed, confused, hair-trigger-balanced emotions known as the developing pre-teen's mind (AKA a good Eva-pilot, haha)

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Jul 03, 2016 3:06 pm Or that she has reappeared on a different beach/mountain/plain/whatever. It would be pretty inconvenient if the whole population were to materialise on the same beach!

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jul 05, 2016 3:30 am Gendo tangent split here: thread/18431/Questions-about-Gendo-and-EoE/

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Jul 06, 2016 10:55 pm Chainer3000 wrote: Is it possible Misato never joined in the human instrumentally project? She, like Gendo, was killed prior to the actual Rei-soul-grabbing, and that seemed to have excluded Gendo from joining in on the LCL party. I always thought it remained a bit ambiguous as to whether or not she took part.

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 07, 2016 12:25 am During the "Komm, susser Tod" sequence, Rei is quite clearly seen melting down Misato's corpse for the purpose of collecting the soul within. The recently deceased were included in HIP and are thus eligible for returning afterward.

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by Apox » Fri Jul 08, 2016 10:02 am jcmoorehead wrote: Well it's down to interpretation but the chances are she did eventually come back. My assumption is that what we see on that beach is pretty much just after 3I and Asuka/Shinji are the first two to return. Yui tells us that others can return so I think it's likely that Misato will come back. I also think her reaction to Shinji would be positive, she'd be likely to give him and possibly Asuka a massive hug after all they have gone through. I think the state of the world would shock or disturb her, but they would power through. Whilst its true Shinji was the catalyst for the destruction it wasn't as if he had much choice and in the end he was the saviour of humanity. That destruction was going to happen regardless and if it wasn't for Rei at the last minute giving the keys to Shinji it would have ended completely in either SEELE or Gendo's favour.

[]: Re: Misato after 3I             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Jul 08, 2016 10:44 am Apox wrote: Misato always struck me as a cold vengeful bitch that was putting on a "wholesome" act.
